points.title: Gal Vihara
points.description: Four magnificent Buddha statues carved from a single granite wall, considered the masterpiece of ancient Sinhalese sculpture.

points.title: Watadage (Circular Relic House)
points.description: Unique circular building with intricate stone carvings that once housed the Sacred Tooth Relic.

points.title: Rankot Vehera
points.description: The largest stupa in Polonnaruwa, standing 54 meters high and built in the 12th century.

points.title: Lankatilaka Temple
points.description: Imposing brick temple with thick walls reaching 17 meters high, containing a headless Buddha statue.

points.title: Parakrama Samudraya
points.description: Massive ancient reservoir built by King Parakramabahu I, still used for irrigation today.

points.title: Royal Palace Complex
points.description: Ruins of King Parakramabahu's seven-story palace with thick walls and Royal Bath.
